events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to Queen's iconic guitarist, Brian May! What's your favourite riff or solo from the rock legend?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Jagger's Legacy
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young! Wishing a very happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. What's your ultimate Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the very first music video aired.

angles.name: The Day The Video Star Was Born
angles.copy: Remember when MTV launched and changed music forever? Today marks the anniversary of its debut in 1981, kicking off with The Buggles' iconic 'Video Killed The Radio Star.' Did it really kill the radio star, though? We think not!

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Iconic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of British music. What's your favourite track from this Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, '3 Days of Peace & Music', began on this day in 1969, featuring iconic performances from artists like Jimi Hendrix and Janis Joplin.

angles.name: Peace and Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago today, the Woodstock Festival kicked off! Three days of peace, music, and legendary performances. Which artist would you have loved to see live?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death (1977)
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, 49 years after his passing. His music lives on forever.

events.title: Tupac Shakur would have been 55
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the passing of hip-hop icon Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55 years old.

angles.name: Tupac's Enduring Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering a true legend. It's 30 years since we lost Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55 today. His impact on music and culture remains undeniable.

events.title: Jimi Hendrix would have been 84
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the death of guitar virtuoso Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84 years old.

angles.name: Remembering Jimi
angles.copy: Fifty-six years since we lost the incomparable Jimi Hendrix. The guitar legend would have been 84 today, and his influence still resonates.

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Walk This Way
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago today, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous in music history! What's your favourite track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Goddess
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon, what's your go-to Pretenders track?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Mad For It
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite tune from the legendary frontman?

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' (1971)
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic single 'Imagine' on this day in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon released the timeless anthem 'Imagine.' Its message of peace and unity resonates just as strongly today.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising portable music players.

angles.name: 1000 Songs In Your Pocket
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? Today marks 25 years since Apple unveiled the device that put '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changed how we listen to music forever!

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 64 years since 007 first hit the big screen. Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the best theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering The Beatles legend John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we're celebrating the life and music of John Lennon. His message of peace and love endures.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic comedian and actor John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday today.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, what's your favourite moment from the comedy icon?
